overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person driving perspective from the driver's seat during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates urban streets, executes a left turn at an intersection, and stops at a bus stop to pick up passengers. Windshield wipers are active throughout, and the environment features modern glass buildings and wet asphalt roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with tram tracks approaching intersection

events.description: executing left turn at traffic light intersection
passing through intersection with green traffic light

agents.ego_description: driving bus through heavy rain with active windshield wipers, approaching and executing a left turn at a traffic-controlled intersection

notable_agents.action: oncoming car waiting at the intersection traffic light

entered.detail: bus driver instrument panel with speedometer and control buttons
active wipers sweeping across front windshield clearing heavy rain
exterior side mirror showing left side traffic view
exterior side mirror showing right side traffic view
contemporary office building with reflective glass facade
tall concrete wall running parallel to the road
metal tram rails embedded in the asphalt road surface
overhead traffic signal suspended above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment begins from the driver's perspective inside a bus cockpit during a heavy downpour. The windshield wipers move rhythmically as the bus approaches an intersection with tram tracks visible on the wet asphalt. A modern glass building stands on the right while a concrete barrier lines the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with parked vehicles and residential buildings

events.description: passing red car parked on the right side of the street
navigating slight right curve in road alignment

agents.ego_description: continuing along wet urban street at steady speed, navigating past parked cars and maintaining course through the rain

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with balconies facing the street
stationary red sedan parked at the curb
white vehicle parked along the sidewalk
covered glass and metal passenger waiting shelter visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: After completing the left turn, the bus proceeds along a straight urban street lined with parked cars on the right and apartment buildings on the left. The rain continues to fall steadily as the vehicle passes a red parked car and approaches a bus stop shelter visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop with shelter and waiting passengers

events.description: braking and coming to complete stop at designated bus stop
bus doors opening to allow passenger boarding
camera panning right to monitor side mirror and door area during boarding

agents.ego_description: stopped at designated bus stop with doors open, temporarily panning camera right to monitor passenger boarding through the side mirror

notable_agents.action: woman in green shirt waiting at bus stop shelter, preparing to board the bus
man in dark clothing entering the bus through the front door

entered.detail: white zebra stripes painted on the road surface near the bus stop
vertical pole with route information and stop identification
large planters with greenery lining the sidewalk near the shelter
interior view of bus door mechanism and entry steps visible when camera pans right

segments.scene_description: The bus slows and stops at a bus stop shelter where passengers are waiting in the rain. After opening the doors, the camera pans right to monitor the boarding process through the side mirror, showing the interior door area as passengers enter the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach after bus stop

events.description: accelerating from stationary position and merging back into traffic flow
approaching next traffic light intersection with red signal visible

agents.ego_description: departing from bus stop and accelerating through the wet streets, approaching the next intersection with traffic lights

notable_agents.action: red truck moving in the opposite direction on the left side of the road

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal at next intersection showing red light
traffic signs and directional markers mounted on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls away from the stop and accelerates along the rain-slicked road. A red truck passes in the opposite direction as the vehicle approaches the next intersection, where traffic lights are visible ahead showing a red signal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cockpit as it navigates a rain-slicked urban environment from a busy intersection to a passenger stop and beyond. It begins amidst a heavy downpour with rhythmic windshield wipers clearing the view of tram tracks and a modern glass building before the vehicle executes a left turn. As the bus proceeds along a straight street, the scenery shifts to a corridor of apartment buildings and parked cars, leading the camera toward a distant bus stop shelter. The vehicle then slows to a halt, where the perspective pans right toward the side mirror to monitor passengers boarding through the open doors. Finally, the bus pulls away and accelerates back into the rain, passing a red truck as it approaches a red traffic signal at the next intersection.
